{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603212259207CD2D8B59343CA4B7508\"}"},"total":54},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7565275236970349337","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好听好看，好材料好素材，好口才口齿清晰，人物介绍清晰人物形象忒好了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761436702,"group_id":"7487041511821937726","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8QDekvLeHpgTiM3NvvQdBOvDMcciVa7pBE5bcmDHfGx","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3351758032612024","user_name":"东伦内尔岛的小思远"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3351758032612024","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7487041511821937726","book_info":{"abstract":"4000年历史里中国最早古典名著；世界最早志怪神话名著；先秦十大奇书之首；三星堆考古发掘现场众多文物与《山海经》记述完全吻合；教育部推荐中小学语文必读书目；它超越了时空的限制，记叙神奇的人物、400多种怪物、550多座海外仙山，40多个邦国，还有奇珍异宝……形象地展现了一幅幅神奇的远古生活图卷。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/796d8ecffa81b341f15af812dc26355c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"纳兰陀","author_id":"","book_id":"7487041511821937726","book_name":"山海经（白话全集）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#700800","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"33.6万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":941,\"name\":\"文学经典\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=941\u0026name=文学经典\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":98,\"name\":\"中国名著\",\"sc
